flirty.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_: <flirty>An empty shop is a tragedy, handsome. Bring me something to work on.</flirty>
<flirty>A hook, and I'll make you proud. Surely you can manage that?</flirty>
<flirty>A basin would make everything flow so much better, sweetheart.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.village_life.butche: <flirty>The butcher is handsome. Just saying. Maybe you should introduce yourself.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.village_life.smokeh: <flirty>Smokehouse ham, candlelight, good company. Just a thought.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.village_life.tanner: <flirty>That tanner makes the softest leather. I know a few uses for it.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main/2: <flirty>Hey there, sugar!</flirty> How's your day going?
flirty.dialogue.main/3: <flirty>Hey, good-looking! Nice to lay my eyes on you!</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main/4: <excited>What's the scoop, hot stuff?</excited> Anything exciting happening today?
flirty.dialogue.main/5: <flirty>How's the most attractive person I've seen today?</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.hug.success/2: <happy>Mmm, thank you for that delightful embrace.</happy> Just what I needed to lighten up my day.
flirty.dialogue.hug.success/4: <flirty>My, oh my, you're as cozy as a pile of freshly fluffed pillows!</flirty> Quite irresistible, I must say.
flirty.dialogue.hug.success/6: <excited>Oh my, you are positively radiating warmth!</excited> It's like basking in the sun on a tropical beach. <flirty>Simply enchanting!</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.hug.fail/2: <flirty>Oh, come on, don't be shy.</flirty> A hug from me would set your heart aflutter.
flirty.dialogue.hug.fail/6: Oh, my sweet, let me save you from those dreadful germs by <flirty>wrapping you in my loving embrace.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <whisper>Oh, if only time could freeze in this blissful moment.</whisper>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <flirty>Darling, my heart flutters just being near you...</flirty> <whisper>I may be falling for you.</whisper>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.success/3: <flirty>Mmm, your lips are as sweet as pumpkin pie, my delectable crush.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.success/4: <flirty>Mmm! Your kisses are like a drizzle of honey on my lips, irresistible and intoxicating.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.success/5: <flirty>Oh, my enchanting %1$s, you possess the art of kissing like no other.</flirty> <whisper>You leave me breathless.</whisper>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.success/6: <excited>Oh my, %1$s, your kisses surpass even Ash's!</excited> *giggles coyly*
flirty.dialogue.kiss.fail/1: <whisper>Let's find a more secluded spot, darling.</whisper>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.fail/2: Oh, honey, <nervous>that's not the kind of kiss that will make me weak in the knees.</nervous>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.fail/5: <nervous>Well, aren't you just a charmer! Thank you, I guess?</nervous>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <angry>Hands off, big shot!</angry> You need to up your game if you want a piece of this.
flirty.dialogue.chat.success/4: They say an apple a day keeps the zombies away, but honey, <flirty>nothing can keep me away from you.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.success/15: <happy>Ah, the pitter-patter of little feet.</happy> Someday, I hope to have a bundle of joy myself. Now, I just need to find that special someone to share the journey with.
flirty.dialogue.chat.success/20: Sweetheart, let me confess, <flirty>I often find myself daydreaming about this exquisite delicacy known as cheese.</flirty> It's like a tantalizing desire that lingers on my taste buds.
flirty.dialogue.chat.fail/1: <nervous>Wow, did you seriously just say that to me?</nervous> Smooth.
flirty.dialogue.chat.fail/9: Huh? Did you say something? <flirty>Sorry, I was too busy being captivated by your charm to listen.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.story.success/1: <excited>Oh my, I simply can't believe all of that actually happened!</excited> It's like a thrilling adventure just unfolded before my eyes!
flirty.dialogue.story.success/3: <happy>Your storytelling skills are absolutely enchanting!</happy> Is this story an original masterpiece crafted by your own imagination?
flirty.dialogue.story.success/4: <excited>Wait, hold on! Are you telling me that all of those mind-blowing events actually took place just yesterday? Unbelievable!</excited>
flirty.dialogue.story.fail/6: <sleepy>*snoring* Uh-huh, what?</sleepy> Sorry, I was just dreaming about our next romantic escapade.
flirty.dialogue.story.fail/8: <sleepy>Yawn! How boring...</sleepy> but maybe you can spice things up with a little flirtatious banter?
flirty.dialogue.flirt.success/2: <excited>Oh, you smooth-talker!</excited> <flirty>Your charm is off the charts!</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.flirt.success/3: <nervous>*Giggles* Are you trying to make my heart skip a beat?</nervous>
flirty.dialogue.flirt.success/4: <excited>Oh my goodness, you're just too good-looking for words!</excited>
flirty.dialogue.flirt.success/5: <flirty>That was beyond charming!</flirty> <excited>You had me hooked from the moment I laid eyes on you!</excited>
flirty.dialogue.flirt.success/6: <flirty>How is it possible for someone to exude such beauty?</flirty> <whisper>Whenever you're around, my heart skips a beat.</whisper>
flirty.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <nervous>Oh please, you're making me weak in the knees with those compliments!</nervous>
flirty.dialogue.flirt.fail/2: Oh honey, <angry>don't give me that line.</angry> I've heard it all before.
flirty.dialogue.flirt.fail/5: Sweetie, <angry>even a creeper has more game than you do.</angry>
flirty.dialogue.flirt.fail/6: <nervous>Sorry, but that's a hard pass from me.</nervous>
flirty.dialogue.joke.creative.success/3: <excited>Oh my, that's the most delightful joke I've heard all day!</excited>
flirty.dialogue.joke.creative.success/5: <excited>Hahaha! You're such a charmer!</excited> You should consider a career in comedy, my dear!
flirty.dialogue.joke.creative.success/6: <yell>BAHAHHA!</yell> That joke of yours is the epitome of brilliance!
flirty.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/1: <nervous>Oh, sweetie, joking about that is a no-no.</nervous>
flirty.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/7: Honey, stick to your day job, because <angry>comedy clearly isn't your strong suit.</angry>
flirty.dialogue.procreate_engaged/1: <nervous>I must admit, my heart yearns for the security of matrimony before we embark on the journey of procreation.</nervous>
flirty.dialogue.shake_hand.success/2: <flirty>Your grip is simply electrifying!</flirty> I can feel the sparks between us.
flirty.dialogue.shake_hand.success/5: <flirty>Well, hello, handsome! Your hand feels like a dream come true.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main.morning/2: <happy>Mornin', love.</happy> Are you ready to conquer the day together?
flirty.dialogue.main.morning/3: <sleepy>I'm still a little tired,</sleepy> but <flirty>seeing you makes it all worth it.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main.morning/5: Looks like someone had quite the night. <flirty>I hope you saved some energy for me.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main.morning/7: Did you sleep well, sweetheart? <flirty>You look absolutely radiant.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main.morning/8: <happy>Morning, sleepyhead!</happy> Want a little pick-me-up from yours truly?
flirty.dialogue.main.morning/9: <excited>What a stunning morning to spend with a stunning person like you.</excited> Let's make today unforgettable.
flirty.dialogue.main.morning/10: <sleepy>I might take it slow today, my dear.</sleepy> But don't worry, I'll still be thinking of you.
flirty.dialogue.main.evening/5: You know, I'm thinking about heading home soon and starting dinner. <flirty>But hey, if you're free later, maybe we could cook up something together?</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>My goodness, I'm absolutely drained.</sleepy> I might just take a nap soon. <flirty>Care to join me, handsome?</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main.night/1: <sleepy>*yawn*</sleepy> So, what brings you out at this ungodly hour?
flirty.dialogue.main.night/2: Oh, burning the midnight oil, huh? <flirty>I like a person who knows how to live dangerously.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main.night/3: <flirty>Nighttime is when the real fun begins, don't you think?</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main.night/5: The village guards may keep us safe, but <whisper>the thrill of the night... it's electrifying, isn't it?</whisper>
flirty.dialogue.main.night/6: <whisper>Darkness has this enchanting aura, don't you think?</whisper> It's the perfect time to get lost in each other's company.
flirty.dialogue.main.night/7: Daytime is for amateurs; <flirty>nighttime is when the real magic happens.</flirty> Care to join me for a moonlit walk?
flirty.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>I'm feeling sooo tired,</sleepy> but I guess it's worth it for a day filled with excitement like this. <flirty>Maybe we could rest together tomorrow?</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.main.night/9: <whisper>Can't wait to snuggle up under the covers,</whisper> but <flirty>I wouldn't mind some company to keep me warm.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.greet/1: <flirty>Hey, handsome!</flirty> How are you doing today?
flirty.dialogue.greet/5: <flirty>Greetings, %1$s!</flirty> I must say, it's always a pleasure to lay eyes on you!
flirty.dialogue.greet/8: <flirty>Hello, darling!</flirty> It's absolutely lovely to see your charming self. How's the world treating you today?
flirty.dialogue.greet.success/1: <excited>Oh, that's simply wonderful!</excited> I'm absolutely thrilled to hear it!
flirty.dialogue.greet.success/3: <excited>Oh, honey, I'm positively delighted to hear that!</excited> It's music to my ears!
flirty.dialogue.greet.success/5: <excited>Well, well, well, isn't that just the best news ever?</excited> I'm positively ecstatic to know it!
flirty.dialogue.greet.negative/1: Oh, darling, do you really have to grace me with your presence? <nervous>I was hoping for a more charming encounter.</nervous>
flirty.dialogue.apologize.success/5: <happy>Ah, my love, it's completely fine. I forgive you with all my heart.</happy>
flirty.dialogue.apologize.fail/2: <angry>Ouch! Did you intentionally try to make physical contact with my fabulous self?</angry>
flirty.dialogue.apologize.fail/5: Darling, I hate to break it to you, but <angry>there's absolutely no chance I'm buying your sorry act.</angry>
flirty.dialogue.location.igloo/1: <excited>Oh, oh, guess what I stumbled upon at %2$s?</excited> An enchanting igloo! Can you imagine, a house made of snow? *giggles* <frozen>It's simply too cold for my taste, darling.</frozen>
flirty.dialogue.location.igloo/2: <whisper>Darling, you won't believe what I discovered at %2$s!</whisper> A deserted igloo, just waiting for someone adventurous like me to swoop in. But shh, between you and me, <scared>rumor has it that the place is bewitched.</scared> I swear, I get the most delightful shivers whenever I pass by...
flirty.dialogue.location.ancient_city/0: <whisper>Oh, darling, have you heard those mysterious and alluring sounds echoing from %2$s?</whisper> <mysterious>Deep beneath the surface, a secret awaits.</mysterious>
flirty.dialogue.location.ancient_city/1: <mysterious>Oh, my curious heart, I have this undeniable feeling that there's something enchanting hidden far beneath the ground at %2$s.</mysterious> <flirty>Care to join me on an adventure of discovery?</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.location.ancient_city/3: <mysterious>Ah, my dear, let me share with you the whispers of legends. It is said that %2$s houses an ancient city, shrouded in mystery.</mysterious> Alas, I have yet to lay my eyes upon its underground wonders. <flirty>Care to embark on a quest for its hidden treasures with me?</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.location.mansion/1: Oh honey, if you're feeling adventurous, you simply must visit %2$s. There's this enchanting mansion owned by those illagers. <scared>But be warned, darling, it's positively cursed!</scared>
flirty.dialogue.location.monument/2: <whisper>Sweetheart, let me tell you about the whispers of an ancient underwater treasure trove, nestled deep in the ocean at %2$s.</whisper> It's a daring adventure, my love, but oh, the treasures you could discover. <scared>Just remember, danger lurks at every turn.</scared>
flirty.dialogue.location.swamp_hut/1: Oh honey, let me tell you about that sultry swamp over yonder at %2$s. <mysterious>There's this bewitching enchantress who calls it her home.</mysterious> <scared>If I were you, I'd steer clear of that place, unless you want to get caught in her web of trouble.</scared>
flirty.dialogue.joke.monster.success/1: <happy>Haha! That Skelly never stood a chance against you, darling!</happy>
flirty.dialogue.joke.monster.success/4: <excited>Oh my, you actually convinced a skeleton to take out a creeper?! That's simply breathtaking, haha!!</excited>
flirty.dialogue.joke.animal.success/4: <excited>Oh honey, that's just too silly for words, but you know what? I adore it!</excited> It's the kind of humor that makes my heart skip a beat!
flirty.dialogue.flirt.slap/1: <nervous>Pardon me, but you simply take my breath away!</nervous>
flirty.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <angry>Oh, sweetie, if you even think about repeating that move, I'll make sure you'll feel my fiery passion burning on your skin!</angry>
flirty.dialogue.chat.plains/3: <whisper>Have you ever seen the plains at night? It's like a romantic symphony of stars and gentle breezes.</whisper> <flirty>Just imagine us, lying beneath the night sky, whispering secrets to each other.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.plains/5: Ah, the crisp air of the plains, intoxicating and invigorating. <flirty>It's like a breath of fresh air, just like the feeling I get whenever I'm around you.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/1: <frozen>Brrr, it's chilly out here!</frozen> But <flirty>with the right company, I wouldn't mind the cold one bit.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/3: Oh, darling, <frozen>this weather calls for cozying up with someone special by a roaring fire.</frozen> <flirty>Care to join me?</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.desert/1: <burning>Wow, it's scorching hot out here in the desert,</burning> but don't worry, <flirty>I'll keep you cool.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.desert/2: <burning>The desert is like a never-ending summer,</burning> and <flirty>I'm the hottest thing in it.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.desert/4: <whisper>When the night falls, the desert becomes a romantic oasis,</whisper> <flirty>perfect for stargazing with someone as charming as me.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.chat.desert/5: <burning>Oh my, the sun today is absolutely punishing.</burning> But don't worry, <flirty>I'll protect you from its wrath.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.story.nether.success/1: <burning>Is it just me or is it getting hot in here?</burning>
flirty.dialogue.story.nether.success/2: <excited>Oh, surviving in the dangerous depths of the Nether?</excited> <flirty>You must be quite the thrill-seeker. I'm allured by your daring nature.</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.story.nether.success/3: <whisper>Rumor has it that the Nether holds untold riches for those who can handle its intensity.</whisper> <flirty>If only I had someone as bold as you to guide me through it...</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.story.enderdragon.succes: <excited>Oh my, have you come bearing not only the spoils of victory but also the majestic dragon egg? How utterly captivating!</excited>
<excited>My, my! You have slayed the legendary dragon, haven't you?</excited> The entire village shall swoon over your heroic feat for eons to come!
flirty.dialogue.story.wither.success/1: <excited>No way!</excited> <whisper>So, I've heard whispers about the Wither wreaking havoc.</whisper> Juicy, huh?
flirty.dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <excited>Oh, my sweet hero, you've not only defeated the Wither but captured my heart too! Astounding!</excited>
flirty.dialogue.stay.success/1: <excited>Oh, thank you!</excited> <happy>I would absolutely adore staying in this charming village!</happy>
flirty.dialogue.stay.success/2: <excited>Oh my, this village is simply marvelous!</excited> I would be delighted to stay here!
flirty.dialogue.no_money/1: <angry>Baby, are you trying to play me?</angry> These services don't come cheap, you know. Need to bring me more emeralds, honey.
flirty.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/1: <flirty>Ready to get your heart shattered in a game of rock, paper, scissors, darling?</flirty>
flirty.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/2: <excited>Brace yourself, sweetheart, because I'm about to sweep you off your feet</excited> and win this round of rock, paper, scissors!
flirty.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_: <flirty>Give me a cleaver, darling. I'm useless without one.</flirty>
<flirty>Bring me a skinning knife, darling. This hide deserves a gentle touch.</flirty>
